recommendations.title: Cash Out
recommendations.overview: Criminal mastermind Mason is about to execute the score of a lifetime when his lover and key member of his crew, Decker, takes the team down and reveals she’s an undercover Interpol agent. Heartbroken, Mason escapes and retires from the life of crime

recommendations.title: Savage Salvation
recommendations.overview: Newly engaged Shelby John and Ruby Red want a fresh start after their struggles with addiction, but when Shelby discovers his beloved Ruby dead on their porch, he embarks on a vengeful killing spree of the dealers who supplied her. Armed with nothing

recommendations.title: Money Plane
recommendations.overview: A professional thief with $40 million in debt and his family's life on the line must commit one final heist - rob a futuristic airborne casino filled with the world's most dangerous criminals.

recommendations.title: Ocean's Eleven

recommendations.title: Lupin the Third: The Mystery of Mamo
recommendations.overview: While attempting to win the affections of a beautiful rival, a master thief risks death to learn the secret intentions of a wealthy and seemingly immortal, but certainly ruthless, recluse.

recommendations.title: Headhunters
recommendations.overview: An accomplished headhunter risks everything to obtain a valuable painting owned by a former mercenary.

recommendations.title: Red Notice
recommendations.overview: An Interpol-issued Red Notice is a global alert to hunt and capture the world's most wanted. But when a daring heist brings together the FBI's top profiler and two rival criminals, there's no telling what will happen.

recommendations.title: Danger: Diabolik
recommendations.overview: International man of mystery Diabolik and his sensuous lover Eva Kant pull off heist after heist, all while European cops led by Inspector Ginko and envious mobsters led by Ralph Valmont are closing in on them.
